---
title: "hba1c_follow_up"
subtitle: "`hba1c_follow_up`"
description: "hba1c_follow_up"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/hba1c_follow_up/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                         | Title                                      | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                |
|----------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                      | The unique name of the event               | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                         |
| `center`                                     | Research center                            | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                      |
| `date_hba1c_measurement_extra`               | date_hba1c_measurement_extra               | date   | Date of HbA1c measurement. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument.                                                                               |
| `hba1c_extra_reason_extra`                   | hba1c_extra_reason_extra                   | string | Specifies the reason for an additional HbA1c measurement. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument.                                                |
| `hba1c_extra_reason_hba1c_extra`             | hba1c_extra_reason_hba1c_extra             | string | Records the visit/week where the HbA1c value was above 53 mmol/mol. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument.                                      |
| `hba1c_extra_reason_other_extra`             | hba1c_extra_reason_other_extra             | string | Other reason for extra HbA1c taken. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument.                                                                      |
| `hba1c_extra_reason_fingerstick_extra`       | hba1c_extra_reason_fingerstick_extra       | string | Records the visit/week where the glucose level by fingerstick measurement was to high. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument.                   |
| `hba1c_extra_reason_fingerstick_other_extra` | hba1c_extra_reason_fingerstick_other_extra | string | Description of other week of fingerstick blood sugar measurement. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument.                                        |
| `hba1c_extra_reason_cgm_extra`               | hba1c_extra_reason_cgm_extra               | string | Records the visit/week where the glucose level by CGM measurement was to high. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument.                           |
| `hba1c_extra_reason_cgm_other_extra`         | hba1c_extra_reason_cgm_other_extra         | string | Description of other week of CGM blood sugar measurement. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument.                                                |
| `hba1c_value_extra`                          | hba1c_value_extra                          | number | HbA1c value, mmol/mol. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument.                                                                                   |
| `hba1c_participant_extra`                    | hba1c_participant_extra                    | string | Participant contacted regarding initiation of glucose lowering medication via the responsible physician. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument. |
| `hba1c_responsible_physician_extra`          | hba1c_responsible_physician_extra          | string | Contact made with responsible physisian regarding blood glucose. HbA1c extra. Repeated instrument.                                         |

: Fields in the `hba1c_follow_up` resource.
